description: An aerial photograph captures a green combine harvester actively engaged in harvesting an agricultural field. The image shows the field divided into two distinct sections by the machine's path: the left side consists of rows of freshly cut crop stubble, indicating the harvested area, while the right side displays standing, unharvested crops with a golden-brown hue. The combine harvester is positioned centrally, moving upwards through the field, with a visible yellow stream of harvested material (likely grain) being fed into its internal hopper. A plume of dust or exhaust emanates from the rear of the vehicle, and a dark shadow of the harvester is cast onto the unharvested portion of the field, extending towards the lower right.
